.file-embed.background: rgb(243, 241, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(239, 235, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(239, 235, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(239, 235, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(253, 252, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(243, 241, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(243, 241, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(152, 115, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
